travel is the only thing you buy that makes you richer ✨🌎💠💎🕌✨ visited this stunning mirror mosque in #shiraz with @visitouriran #iran 

📍 Ali-Ebn-E-Hamzeh - a Persian architecture build in the 12th century. Also known as the mirror mosque where coloured mirror glass shards covered every inch of the enchanting interior
